column1: # Medicaid expansion adoption timing — the treatment calendar.
# expansion_year = first full calendar year of implemented expansion (newly-eligible
# enrolment begins). States that never expanded in the window have expansion_year blank
# (never-treated controls). Source: KFF "Status of State Medicaid Expansion Decisions"
# Verified vintage 2026-06-15. Late adopters (>2019) are outside the core window and
# treated as not-yet-treated controls within it.
